variables.description: Check all q variables are sym and real
variables.name: isa(q1,'sym') && isa(q2,'sym') && isa(q3,'sym') && isa(q4,'sym') && isa(q5,'sym') && isa(q6,'sym') && isreal(q1) && isreal(q2) && isreal(q3) && isreal(q4) && isreal(q5) && isreal(q6)
variables.output_ok: All q variables are of type sym and real
variables.output_fail: One or more q variables are not sym or not real

variables.description: Check all Jacobian matrices are sym and have correct dimensions
variables.name: isa(Jtheta,'sym') && isa(Jp,'sym') && isa(J,'sym') && isequal(size(Jtheta),[3,6]) && isequal(size(Jp),[3,6]) && isequal(size(J),[6,6])
variables.output_ok: Jtheta, Jp, and J are sym and have correct sizes
variables.output_fail: One or more matrices are not sym or have incorrect size

tests.description: Compare symbolic J with Robotics Toolbox geometricJacobian
